历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Science/Physics Category was approximately 8744→13611→14898→13719→14075. After a significant drop in 2022, it fluctuated within the range of 13700–14900 in the past three years. The baseline for 2025 is about 14075. The enrollment plan file for §7 could not be read due to data access limitations, so it was processed by fallback rules and not included in the plan_change calculation.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 58th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the 52–61 range in recent years. The reputation and popularity files could not be read due to access limitations. It has 5 A- or above disciplines: Education A, Geography A, Marxist Theory A, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Foreign Languages and Literature A-, with prominent normal university characteristics, exerting a stable attraction on candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The major popularity file was not read. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in this province is 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% compared to 173,347 in 2025, leading to slightly eased competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuation of historical rankings within the 13700–14900 range, the slight decrease in Physics Category candidates in 2026 (slightly eased competition), and the stable school level, the ranking is expected to move slightly forward based on the 2025 baseline of 14075. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 13875, with a range of 13375–14375.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 13375–14375, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<13375), you can focus on aiming for advantageous majors such as Mathematics and Physics.
